title: deAO Fast Food Playset for Kids 71PCS Pretend Play Food with Cash Register, Drink Dispenser & Burger Play Set for Role Play Toys, Kitchen Playset for Ages 3+ Boys Girls (Red)
features: 71PCS Pretend Play Fast Food Set: Our kids fast food playset includes play burgers, fries, tarts, chicken legs, ice cream, sandwiches, drinks, ketchup, trays, play cash and card etc. Kids can use their imagination to DIY freely and combine them into different fast food sets

Realistic Kitchen Food Accessories: This kitchen food toy set accessories are not only realistic and colorful. It also includes a cash register with a sound feature and a drink dispenser with a water dispensing feature, adding a layer of realism to kids' pretend play experience

Educational Learning Toys: This role-play kitchen toys can enhance fine motor skills, stimulate creativity and imagination, strengthen hand-eye coordination, help toddlers improve cognitive ability and color perception

Durable and Safe Material: Pretend toddler fast food toy is made of non-toxic, sturdy and durable ABS plastic, with smooth and burr-free surface, which is safe for your kids and you don't need to worry about hurting your kids' little hands while playing

Ideal Toys for Kids: Pretend play food set is an ideal toy for boys and girls on Birthday, Halloween, Christmas, Easter or any special festival. Fun hamburger design will attract kid’s interest immediately and children will fall in love with this food toys
